de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.varexp

    • Method Detail

      • build

        public VariableCondition build(java.lang.Object[] arguments,
                               java.util.List<java.lang.String> parameters,
                               boolean negated)
        Description copied from interface: ConditionBuilder
        Should construct a variable condition for the given arguments and parameters. The arguments are the adhering the type specified in TacletBuilderCommand.getArgumentTypes().

        For a varcond \varcond(\abc[p1,p2](a1, a2)) the arguments are a1 and a2, the parameters are p1 and p2. negated is true if \not is used.
